creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello. 
Adding of new ports without maintainer is not allowed (per Porters Handbook). Would you become maintainer of those ports? 
And one more question, isn't libtorrent-rasterbar 1.0.3 should be linked against libtorrent 1.0.3? And if yes, then I don't see the port for libtorrent 1.0.3 itself. Would you provide it too?
